text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, Air Groove and I head out to a store to
buy some supplies for my office.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Hm? What's that?

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Step right up and try your luck with our New
Year's raffle! This year's grand-prize is a hot
spring vacation for two!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
First-prize winners get a deluxe carrot hamburger
steak! Second-prize winners get a bushel of
carrots! And third-prize winners can take home a
single carrot!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
How about you? The elegant Umamusume over
there! Care to try your luck?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Now that I think about it, we did receive a raffle
ticket while shopping earlier, didn't we?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I'm not particularly interested in the rewards...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: However... this could be considered a seasonal activity. In which case, it would go against my values not to participate.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Yes... I suppose we may as well give it a whirl.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I don't really need your support for something
like this, but okay.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove gives the raffle machine a powerful
spin!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A small plastic ball drops from the tumbler's
opening...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Holy mackerel! We've got ourselves a grand-prize
winner! Come and get the coupon for your hot
spring vacation! Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I... won?!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Heh... Everything I do, I do to the best of my
abilities, but I didn't actually expect to win this
one.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
A hot spring vacation ticket... Quite the
grandiose prize.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: (Hold on...)

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
(I was the one who spun the lever, but we were
originally given that raffle ticket while buying
supplies for the office...)

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: (So who does this actually belong to?)

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: (Who should have the privilege of redeeming it?)
choice_data_list: You look like something's troubling you.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
...It's nothing. I was just wondering who the
rightful owner of the prize is.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You can hold onto it for the time being. I'll tell
you when I determine how we should use it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove forces the ticket into my hands,
leaving it in my care.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Looks like we have another first-prize winner!
Congratulations! You get one deluxe carrot
hamburger steak!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Well, well—this does look high quality. I can see why they call it "deluxe."

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Now the question is, how should we flavor it?
Hmm...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I've got it. Let's do another round at the stores.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Isn't it obvious? You need the perfect
combination of flavors for a delicacy like this.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I think this would benefit from some demi-glace
sauce.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
We'll get the highest quality ingredients and
make a sauce to match our prize.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So we go around the stores once more to cook up
a sauce fit for the meal.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
We got a second-prize winner! It's your lucky day!
You're going home with a bushel of carrots!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Oh... Not bad at all.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
A number of students were telling me that they
wished to practice their cooking.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I'm sure they could use a gift like this.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Let's go. Help me carry everything.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove looks satisfied as we haul the massive
amount of carrots back to the academy.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Would you lookie here! You've won the
third-prize! Here's your carrot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Hmm... Not awful.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Even a single carrot can unlock many possibilities
in the kitchen.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: It can be used for a salad, for stir-fry, for juice...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Tell me, Trainer—what would you make with it?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove and I talk about our favorite carrot
dishes as we head back.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, tough luck! Looks like you pulled a blank
one! Take this pack of tissues as a consolation
prize.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: A mere consolation prize...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
No matter. Luck-based games result in more
losers than winners.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
That's why in real competitions, we must rely on
skill and talent, not luck alone.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Heh... Imagine learning that from a pack of
tissues...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove stares at the pack of tissues, looking
slightly upset.
